types.notes: Rust strings are heap-allocated and owned.
Rust vectors are heap-allocated and owned.
Rust vectors are heap-allocated and owned.
Rust hash sets are heap-allocated and owned.
Rust duration types are used for time intervals.
Rust thread sleep is a static function.

ownership.rationale: Rust requires explicit initialization and thread safety for static data.
Rust references are used for immutable borrowing.
Rust references are used for immutable borrowing.

functions.name: init
post: DataLoader is initialized or returns false

functions.name: load_data
post: Returns LogicalEntity with relevant flights and fares

functions.name: load_from_file
post: Loads data from file or returns false

functions.name: filter_flights
post: Returns filtered flights based on request

functions.name: filter_fares
post: Returns filtered fares based on request

functions.name: validate_data_consistency
post: Returns true if data is consistent, false otherwise

invariants: Every flight has at least one matching fare (by carrier and route)
Same SearchRequest always returns the same LogicalEntity
LogicalEntity contains only flights/fares that match the request
All configured routes have at least one flight+fare combination
Deterministic output from load_data() based on input
No empty LogicalEntity is returned if a route is configured
Data consistency is enforced via validate_data_consistency()
Dataset is built deterministically via create_sample_dataset()

concurrency.thread_safety: DataLoader's static state must be accessed in a thread-safe manner using Rust's Mutex and OnceLock.

raw_spec:
types:
  - cpp: "std::string"
    rust: "String"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Rust strings are heap-allocated and owned."
  - cpp: "std::vector<Flight>"
    rust: "Vec<Flight>"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Rust vectors are heap-allocated and owned."
  - cpp: "std::vector<Fare>"
    rust: "Vec<Fare>"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Rust vectors are heap-allocated and owned."
  - cpp: "std::set<std::string>"
    rust: "HashSet<String>"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Rust hash sets are heap-allocated and owned."
  - cpp: "std::chrono::milliseconds"
    rust: "Duration"
    ownership: "owned"
    notes: "Rust duration types are used for time intervals."
  - cpp: "std::thread::sleep_for"
    rust: "thread::sleep"
    ownership: "static"
    notes: "Rust thread sleep is a static function."

ownership:
  - cpp_pattern: "static std::vector<Flight> flights_;"
    rust_pattern: "static FLIGHTS: OnceLock<Mutex<Vec<Flight>>> = OnceLock::new();"
    rationale: "Rust requires explicit initialization and thread safety for static data."
  - cpp_pattern: "std::vector<Flight> filterFlights(const SearchRequest& req)"
    rust_pattern: "fn filter_flights(req: &SearchRequest) -> Vec<Flight>"
    rationale: "Rust references are used for immutable borrowing."
  - cpp_pattern: "std::vector<Fare> filterFares(const SearchRequest& req)"
    rust_pattern: "fn filter_fares(req: &SearchRequest) -> Vec<Fare>"
    rationale: "Rust references are used for immutable borrowing."

error_paths:
  - source: "bool DataLoader::init(const std::string& dataFile)"
    recovery: "returns false on failure"
    rust: "Result<(), Box<dyn Error>>"
  - source: "bool DataLoader::loadFromFile(const std::string& filename)"
    recovery: "returns false on failure"
    rust: "Result<(), Box<dyn Error>>"
  - source: "std::exception caught during price parsing"
    recovery: "LOG_WARNING and continue"
    rust: "Result<(), Box<dyn Error>>"

functions:
  - name: "init"
    pre: ["DataLoader must not be initialized"]
    post: ["DataLoader is initialized or returns false"]
    side_effects: ["Static data initialization"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "load_data"
    pre: ["DataLoader must be initialized"]
    post: ["Returns LogicalEntity with relevant flights and fares"]
    side_effects: ["Increments load count"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "is_initialized"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns initialization status"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "get_load_count"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns load count"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "reset_load_count"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Resets load count to 0"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies static state"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "get_available_routes"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns list of available routes"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "get_dataset_summary"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns dataset summary as string"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "load_from_file"
    pre: ["File must exist"]
    post: ["Loads data from file or returns false"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies static state"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "filter_flights"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns filtered flights based on request"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "filter_fares"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Returns filtered fares based on request"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n)"
  - name: "validate_data_consistency"
    pre: ["DataLoader must be initialized"]
    post: ["Returns true if data is consistent, false otherwise"]
    side_effects: ["None"]
    complexity: "O(n^2)"
  - name: "create_sample_dataset"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Creates sample dataset"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies static state"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "add_flights_for_route"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Adds flights for given route"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies static state"]
    complexity: "O(1)"
  - name: "add_fares_for_route"
    pre: ["None"]
    post: ["Adds fares for given route"]
    side_effects: ["Modifies static state"]
    complexity: "O(1)"

invariants:
  - "Every flight has at least one matching fare (by carrier and route)"
  - "Same SearchRequest always returns the same LogicalEntity"
  - "LogicalEntity contains only flights/fares that match the request"
  - "All configured routes have at least one flight+fare combination"
  - "Deterministic output from load_data() based on input"
  - "No empty LogicalEntity is returned if a route is configured"
  - "Data consistency is enforced via validate_data_consistency()"
  - "Dataset is built deterministically via create_sample_dataset()"

concurrency:
  thread_safety: "DataLoader's static state must be accessed in a thread-safe manner using Rust's Mutex and OnceLock."
  shared_state: ["FLIGHTS", "FARES", "INITIALIZED", "LOAD_COUNT"]

dependencies:
  - "lazy_static"
  - "serde"
  - "chrono"
  - "thread"
  - "sync"
  - "collections"
  - "log"
  - "anyhow"
  - "Mutex"
  - "OnceLock"
  - "Result"
  - "Box<dyn Error>"
  - "Vec"
  - "String"
  - "HashSet"
  - "Duration"
